feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Datasphere Internal error: SQL View - Resource governor for 'cursors' exceeded
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have define an SQL View which uses a few local table variables to split up the logic and returns a union of these temporary tables.

Whenever I attempt to preview the result, I run into the following error:

internal error: Error opening the cursor for the remote database <DWC_BWBRIDGESPACE.BWBRIDGE> [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB SO][HDBODBC] General error;403 internal error: An error occurred while opening the cursor for the remote database. The server name: "DWCHDL2" [SAP][ODBC Driver][SAP HANA Cloud, data lake Relational Engine]Resource governor for 'cursors' exceededThe problematic query: "SELECT

If return each of table variables on their own, the error doesn't appear and I can preview the data just fine.How can I debug this further? Is there a parameter I can check to see where the issue may be coming from?

entry.title: Datasphere: Table Function - Union with Tuple instead of a Table
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm creating a SQL-based View in Datasphere. I have a requirement to create multiple versions from the same record I'm looping over. I have inititalized a table variable to hold my result and have created a cursor over my source table. Based on each iteration, I manually create the tuple that I would like to insert as my new record. The issue that I'm facing is appending to my result table. I want to overwrite my result table as the union of itself with the new record, but the syntax check fails as a "from" clause is expected implying that I have to use a table. I know that what I'm trying to achieve is possible on other DBs and SQL flavors but cannot seem to find the equivalent on HANA. Any ideas? I have attached a screenshot of the code snippet.

Thanks!

entry.title: Consuming data from an Analytical Model
entry.content:
Hello experts - 

I’m looking for options to save data in Datasphere by running an analytical model at specific times during the day. However, it seems that Data Flow doesn’t support AM as a source. Are there any alternative approaches?

Thanks,

Hiri

entry.title: environment variables In SAP Datasphere
entry.content: In SAP Datasphere, are there environment variables? What are they? How can I use them?

entry.title: Reconciliation of Data Between SAP and Databricks via SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello  , we’re integrating SAP data (via BW and SAP DI) into Databricks, but we often struggle with data reconciliation and alignment between the two platforms. Has anyone used SAP Datasphere to streamline this process and ensure consistent, accurate data across SAP and Databricks? We’d appreciate any insights, best practices, or lessons learned on how SAP Datasphere can help resolve these challenges and improve data integrity in such a hybrid environment.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP DATASPHERE: DYNAMIC FILTER TO START ON FIRST DAY OF THE YEAR
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working with creating a dynamic filter from a graphic view in SAP Datasphere for a data extraction from a remote table that contains 20 million records from the source system.  I would like to apply a date filter to only extract into Datasphere the previous two years plus current to omit from extracting in the 20 million records.  

Currently I have a manual date filter of POST_DATE BETWEEN '20230101' AND '99991231'.  I would like to apply a dynamic filter so I won't have to change the dates manually each year.  I also need the date function of the filter to start on the first day of the previous two years. 

I tried subtracting the 2 years from the current date function but then the filter will start two years back based on current date.  Example:  20230212.  I need the date to be 20230101

Then for when the year switches to 2026 then the date range of the dynamic filter will be '20240101' AND '99991231'

If anyone can provide assistance that would be great. 

Thank you

entry.title: Cannot use custom CDS view on datasphere replication flow
entry.content:
Hello.

I've created a custom CDS view (a copy paste from the standard CDS C_SALESCHANGEDOCITEMDEX):

However, when trying to use this CDS on a replication flow, is failling (with no details on the error):

When the replication flow uses the standard CDS view (C_SALESCHANGEDOCITEMDEX), there is no errors:

No errors on ST22 or autorization problems on SU53.

Thanks in advance for any help.

entry.title: How to make one file from multiple parquet files in datasphere replication flow
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.
I am reaching out regarding the replication flow in SAP Datasphere, which is generating multiple Parquet files (20 in my case) in the ADLS target source due to large number of records in source.

Could you kindly advise on how to consolidate these generated Parquet files into a single file containing all the data? Additionally, how we can increase file size to optimize number of generated files?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.
Best regards,
Arvind

entry.title: Datasphere trial - domain not trusted
entry.content: While trying to access the Datasphere trial I get this error

entry.title: ID and Description in SAP Datasphere using Business Builder
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to build a report in the SAP Analytics Cloud based on a data model from SAP Datasphere, which among other things has the dimension "Product". The product should be able to be displayed as an ID and / or as a Description.
Therefore, I have created all the necessary tables, text tables and views in the Data Builder in SAP Datasphere and linked them together. If I now create an Analytic Model in the Data Builder (assigning the semantic relationships of attributes and texts) and use this in SAP Analytics Cloud, I can choose between ID and Description there.
Instead of the Data Builder, I would like to create a Consumption Model with the Business Builder and use it in SAP Analytics Cloud, with which the ID-Description-assignment unfortunately does not work; only the ID is displayed.
I have made the following configurations for this:

  • Attribut "ARTNR" (describes the product) within Fact

     

  • Attribute "ARTNR" cannot be selected in Cosumption Model: There are two attributes "ARTNR.ID" and "ARTNR.TEXT" now ("ARTNR.TEXT" can't be selected)
  • Attribute "ARTNRID" within Cosumption Model

     

  • Preview of "ARTNRID" only shows the IDs

I would like to ask for support.

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,

Marcel

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Replication Flow - Projection Functions
entry.content:
Hi All

Where can I see a list of what "Functions" are available when creating a projection mapping rule, and how to use the functions?

I am trying to create a mapping rule in the Replication Flow whereby a target column gets the first 6 characters of a particular source column.

So when creating a Replication Flow, in the Projection section of the target object I have clicked on "Add".

On the "Mapping" page, I have added a new column (string 6) and ticked the box under "Functions / Constants".  In the text box I was then expecting to be able to type LEFT(field1,6) so that I can map the first 6 characters of field 1 to the new field.

But on clicking deploy, I get an error message suggesting the length of the value is 14 when expecting only 6.  I have worked out that the system is counting the length of the text "LEFT(field1,6)" - ie. the system is seeing my mapping rule as a Constant and not a Function.

How do I get the mapping rule to use a Function?  Or am I trying to do something that's not possible and the "Functions / Constants" description in the mapping section is misleading?

I realise I could create another table that includes the new field and update accordingly in a transformation flow, but I was hoping to do such mappings at load time to the replication flow target to avoid duplicating data.

entry.title: Datasphere Data Flow did not import all records
entry.content:
Hello

We have a task chain that runs a data flow which imports a CSV file from an SFTP site.  It has been running weekly without issues, but today it only imported a subset of the rows.  It did not return an error message. 

Has anyone come across this?  Any way to diagnose what happened? 

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Business Data Cloud reference is present in S/4HANA transaction RDBMON
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I found that a Business Data Cloud reference is present inside SAP S/4HANA 2021 756.

I compare a similar system without the notes installed with CNV_NOTE_ANALYZER_DI, and here the reference to BDC are not present.

My question is: 

- given the latest notes installed for Replication flows, that as you see in the image lead to use "Consumer type = APE), abap pipeline engine,

- given the fact that in troubleshooting guide for replication flow the listed mechanism is RMS + APE.

- given the fact that we spot a "BDC" entry in Consumer type.

Do we need to expect a change in the mechanism used by Datasphere / Business Data Cloud to extract data?
Do someone experience in their systems the usage of Consumer type BDC?
What changes from APE to BDC consumer type? is there some documentation?

Best Regards,

Alberto

entry.title: Does SAP Datasphere support connecting to a PostGIS database with geometry attributes?
entry.content:
I am trying to directly read (and import as a remote table) a table from a PostGIS database via JDBC connection in SAP Datasphere. This table contains geographical information stored in a column with the **Geometry** data type.

However, when I attempt to access the table, I encounter an error. I would like to know:
- Does SAP Datasphere support reading tables that include a Geometry attribute?
- Even if I do not intend to use this column, is it still a blocker for accessing the table?

Any insights or workarounds would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Mails regarding failed Taskchains in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

I've noticed that we been receiving mails when a task chain is completed. Although when we take a look at the setting that is selected: 

'Send email notification only when the run has completed with an error'. 

Yet we are still receiving emails, once in a while, when status: completed. Rather than only on failure

Seems like a bug.

entry.title: How to handle variables in SQL based view - Data Sphere
entry.content:
Hi Guys,SAP HANA cloud

Need your expertise in handling the variables in SQL based view. I want to read the values of specific record's fields from the prior record into variables and then want to search a record based on those variables.

Tried using below script but not assigning any values into LINK_LEVEL, FATH_COMP, FATH_GPC, SON_COMP, SON_GPC.

 

DECLARE LV_REC_COUNT INTEGER;
DECLARE LV_INDEX INTEGER;
DECLARE LV_NEST_INDEX INTEGER;
DECLARE LV_INDEX_TEST INTEGER;

DECLARE LV_FATH_COMP NVARCHAR(8);
DECLARE LV_SON_COMP NVARCHAR(8);
DECLARE LV_FATH_GPC NVARCHAR(18);
DECLARE LV_SON_GPC NVARCHAR(18);

-- DECLARE LT_TEMP TABLE ( CONS_SET VARCHAR(2), SU_BUNIT VARCHAR(2) );

LT_COST_03_DATA = SELECT * FROM "APMR_ST_COST_03";
SELECT COUNT(*) INTO LV_REC_COUNT FROM :LT_COST_03_DATA;

LT_COST_INDEX = SELECT *, ' ' AS LINK_LEVEL, ' ' AS FATH_COMP, ' ' AS FATH_GPC, ' ' AS SON_COMP, ' ' AS SON_GPC, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY TOLL_FLAG ORDER BY FRS_CODE, CALMONTH, NFRD_GPNO ) AS ROWNUM FROM :LT_COST_03_DATA;

LT_COST_LINK_FINAL = SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_INDEX WHERE 1 = 100;

LV_INDEX = 1;
LV_NEST_INDEX = 1;

WHILE (LV_INDEX <= 2 )
DO
LV_INDEX = LV_INDEX + 1;
LT_INDEX_RECORD = SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_INDEX WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
IF RECORD_COUNT(:LT_INDEX_RECORD) <> 0 THEN
WHILE (LV_NEST_INDEX <= 20) DO
IF LV_NEST_INDEX = 1 THEN
SELECT "FRS_CODE" INTO LV_FATH_COMP FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
SELECT "FRS_FPUR" INTO LV_SON_COMP FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD WHERE ROWNUM = LV_INDEX;
LT_COST_LINK_FINAL =
SELECT * FROM :LT_INDEX_RECORD
UNION
SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_LINK_FINAL;
ELSE
LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD = SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_INDEX WHERE
"FRS_CODE" = LV_SON_COMP AND
"NFRD_GPNO" = LV_SON_GPC;
IF RECORD_COUNT(:LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD) <> 0 THEN
SELECT "FRS_CODE" INTO LV_FATH_COMP FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD WHERE "FRS_CODE" = LV_SON_COMP AND
"NFRD_GPNO" = LV_SON_GPC;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT "FRS_FPUR" INTO LV_SON_COMP FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT "NFRD_GPNO" INTO LV_FATH_GPC FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;

SELECT REPLACE( "LINK_LEVEL", '' , LV_NEST_INDEX ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "FATH_COMP", '' , LV_FATH_COMP ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "FATH_GPC", '' , LV_FATH_GPC ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "SON_COMP", '' , LV_SON_COMP ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;
SELECT REPLACE( "FATH_GPC", '' , LV_FATH_GPC ) FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD;

LT_COST_LINK_FINAL =
SELECT * FROM :LT_NEST_INDEX_RECORD
UNION
SELECT * FROM :LT_COST_LINK_FINAL;
END IF;
END IF;
LV_NEST_INDEX = LV_NEST_INDEX + 1;
END WHILE;
LV_NEST_INDEX = 1;
ELSE
END IF;
END WHILE;

RETURN :LT_COST_LINK_FINAL;

-----------------------------

Can some one let me know how to get the values of specific fields of specific record into variables or so.

Appreciate your help, thanks.

Regards,

Santosh T.

entry.title: SAP Replication flow from SAP Datasphere to S3
entry.content:
Hello experts, @Matthew_Shaw 

Need a help please?

I am trying to create a replication flow to replicate data from a local table in datasphere to AWS S3.  I want to replicate delta updates on hourly basis, not the full load. I can only see initial only option, I cannot see initial and delta. Can you please help me how to achieve delta replication as I need to run it every hour and don't want to load the systems with full load every time?

Thanks in advance. 

Regards

SK

entry.title: Replacement path with current member for Datasphere
entry.content:
SAP added a similiar feature to Replacement Path in datasphere in the Analytical model using derived variables.

However the 'current member' feature still seems to be missing. Anyone that has figured this one out?

entry.title: Unable to see SAP SuccessFactors custom field in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

We are currently connecting SAP Datasphere to SuccessFactors HCM via OData API but coming across an issue where we are unable to see custom fields from Recruiting in Datasphere. We can see the field in the OData but something is stopping it from being accessible in Datasphere. 

Not all custom fields are inaccessible just some and wondered if anyone could point us to a possible reason as to why we are experiencing this behaviour. 

Many thanks

Alan

entry.title: Debugging Python Script in Datasphere
entry.content:
Can I debug a Python Script in Datasphere? 

Is any kind of output (open a window, print, ...) possible? 

I have a Script which is running in my Python Compiler, but not in Datasphere. 

Thanks for any suggestions.
